info.title: aegissec
info.description: FastAPI backend for authorized security research workflows, runtime execution, session history, graph persistence, and project-scoped coordination.

schema.title: Response Get Auth Status Api Auth Status Get

get.description: Return projects with pagination, sorting, and fuzzy search.

schema.title: Response List Projects Api Projects Get

post.description: Create a new local project container without affecting global user settings.

get.description: Return a project and its linked sessions.

schema.title: Response Delete Project Api Projects  Project Id  Delete

get.description: Read project-scoped defaults that remain separate from global user API settings.

patch.description: Update project-scoped workflow/runtime defaults without storing secrets in the project database.

get.description: Return sessions with optional project/status filters, pagination, sorting, and fuzzy search.

schema.title: Response List Sessions Api Sessions Get

post.description: Create a session that can optionally be linked to a project and runtime policy metadata.

get.description: Return a session record and its persisted message history.

schema.title: Response Delete Session Api Sessions  Session Id  Delete

get.description: Return structured RunLog history entries for the session with filtering and pagination.

schema.title: Response Get Session History Api Sessions  Session Id  History Get

get.description: Return runtime artifacts linked to the session with filtering and pagination.

schema.title: Response Get Session Artifacts Api Sessions  Session Id  Artifacts Get

get.description: Inspect current runtime container health and recent command execution history.
Return a lightweight runtime health snapshot for readiness checks.
Return runtime execution records with optional session filtering, pagination, and search.

schema.title: Response List Runtime Runs Api Runtime Runs Get

get.description: Return persisted runtime artifacts with optional session filtering, pagination, and search.

schema.title: Response List Runtime Artifacts Api Runtime Artifacts Get
Response List Runtime Profiles Api Runtime Profiles Get
Response Cleanup Runtime Artifacts Api Runtime Artifacts Cleanup Post

get.description: Return user-scoped model API defaults backed by local environment files.

put.description: Persist user-scoped LLM defaults in local env files without exposing the secret value in responses.

schema.title: Response List Skills Api Skills Get
Response Rescan Skills Api Skills Rescan Post
Response Scan Skills Api Skills Scan Post
Response Refresh Skills Api Skills Refresh Post
Response Import Mcp Servers Api Mcp Import Post
Response List Mcp Servers Api Mcp Servers Get

get.description: Return workflow templates that can be started for a session.

schema.title: Response List Workflow Templates Api Workflows Templates Get

post.description: Start a workflow run using an explicit template selection payload.
Start a workflow run for a session using the template encoded in the route.

get.description: Return the current workflow run state, task DAG, and execution metadata.

post.description: Advance the workflow state machine, optionally satisfying an approval gate.
